pi_items.metadata_value: "Apply wind effect to create directional motion streaks in an image"

privileged_info_summary: The task downloads real public images from Unsplash (not synthetic data). Primary fallback images are 687x1031 and 687x458 pixel JPEGs from Unsplash URLs that successfully download. The GIMP Wind filter exists at Filters → Distorts → Wind and does create directional motion streaks as claimed. The verifier uses directional gradient analysis to detect wind effects, which is an appropriate detection method. The task description accurately describes the wind effect behavior in GIMP. No synthetic fallback image is created unless both Unsplash downloads fail.
